description: The Mazzagatti are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Oppido Mamertina, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Polimeni and Bonarrigo clans and were involved in a feud with the Ferraro-Raccosta clans from 1992 to 1998 and again from 2011. The clan has been active in the cement business and extortion, with assets seized worth €120 million in 2007.
